locations.name: 约翰·古尔德
locations.summary: 约翰·古尔德 FRS（英語：John Gould，1804年9月14日—1881年2月3日）是19世纪一位英国鸟类学家。1804年生于英格兰，也是一位商人、艺术家。1838年后与其妻一同前往澳大利亚，在当地发现并為许多新物种命名。 早年…

locations.name: Southwest Australia
locations.summary: Southwest Australia is a biogeographic region in Western Australia.

locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

locations.name: Moora, Western Australia
locations.summary: Moora is a townsite located 177 km north of Perth in the Wheatbelt region of Western Australia.

locations.name: Stokes Inlet
locations.summary: Stokes Inlet is an inlet in the Goldfields-Esperance region of Western Australia.

relations.subject: Gilbert's honeyeater
relations.evidence: Gilbert's honeyeater (Melithreptus chloropsis), also known as the Swan River honeyeater or western white-naped honeyeater, is a passerine bird of the honeyeater family Meliphagidae native to southwestern Australia

relations.subject: Gilbert's honeyeater
relations.evidence: Gilbert's honeyeater is found in the southwest corner of Western Australia, where it ranges from Moora in the north, through the jarrah forest belt to Broomehill, the Stirling Range and along the coast to Stokes Inlet.{{cite book |title=Birds of Western Australia |author1=Serventy, D.L
